message:
refactor(sandbox): idiomatic test assertions and stream shutdown fix

- allow_deny_matrix.rs: replace match+panic! with assert!(matches!())
  for LocalhostDenied, InvalidUrl, and HostNotAllowed checks.
- canary_connector.rs: add explicit stream.shutdown(Shutdown::Both)
  after TcpStream::connect succeeds in the seccomp test, preventing
  leaked file descriptors. Import std::net::Shutdown.
- credential_injection_integration.rs: same assert!(matches!())
  cleanup for CredentialError, CredentialNotAuthorized, and
  CredentialHostNotAllowed assertions across all test modules.
- CBOR test vectors regenerated with updated key values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
